full_content: Promote GOV-ARTIFACT-APPROVAL-001, PB-ARTIFACT-APPROVAL-001, ADR-ARTIFACT-FORMALIZATION-GATE-001, and DCL-ARTIFACT-APPROVAL-HOOK-001 to verified after implementing the local PreToolUse formal artifact approval gate, registering it in .claude/settings.json, adding hook regression tests, and wiring those tests into the release-candidate gate.
explicit_change_request: Please resolve this limitation and make strinct GOV enforcement mechanically active.
change_reason: Owner requested strict GOV enforcement become mechanically active; implementation and regression tests completed.
